---
title: "data-dictionary"
format: html
---

### 5/12/26

- set up repo

- set RSS feeds pull

- set up emails

- starting setting up cron, bug in sending on time

### 5/13/26

- fixed cron time bug

- added formatting and formula to making the email to make it more readable

- adding documentation for reproduction

- decided to reformat to a function and manually make a spreadsheet of all

- adding significant doc calls to justice and to epa, the rest don't work

- added cute emojis because why not

- writing lists as rds and then comparing if it's in there or not, if it is then don't include

- updating docs
